name: Charlie Sykes
summary: Conservative commentator and former Milwaukee talk radio host who said he would vote for Joe Biden in 2020 and endorsed Kamala Harris in 2024, arguing Trump should never be allowed near power again.

keyStatements.quote: I just think we have to end this particular segment of American history.
keyStatements.context: Explaining why he planned to vote for Joe Biden

keyStatements.quote: The only two candidates who have a chance to win this election are Kamala Harris and Donald Trump. By voting for Kamala Harris, I think that we draw the line and say that Donald Trump should never be allowed anywhere near power again.
It is about our constitutional norm. It’s about the kind of country that we want to be.
keyStatements.context: Explaining why the election is about democracy rather than policy

timeline.event: Conservative talk radio host in Milwaukee
timeline.significance: Prominent voice in Wisconsin conservative media

timeline.event: Said he would vote for Joe Biden
timeline.significance: Public break with Trump in the 2020 election
Said Trump should never be allowed near power again

credibility.background: Long-time conservative radio host, author, editor of The Bulwark

oppositionReasons: Said Trump should never be allowed near power again
Framed the election as a choice about constitutional norms
Said the country needed to end the Trump era
endorsement: Voted for Joe Biden in 2020 and endorsed Kamala Harris in 2024

sources.title: Wisconsin Conservative Voice Charlie Sykes Is Voting For Joe Biden
